sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n46467" key="zw/nteion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ζώντειον</orth> or <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ζωντεῖον</orth>, <sense id="n46467.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ζητρεῖον</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
